input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8742 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The 1.1.5 tests reference org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor, TypedProps, and TypedActorExtension; these classes are absent from the resolved 2.0.0-M1 pekko-actor_2.13 jar, so generated tests should not preserve those old coverage targets.
Pekko's newer typed actor API is documented under the separate pekko-actor-typed_2.13 artifact; adding it would change the library under test rather than fix setup for pekko-actor_2.13.
The resolved 2.0.0-M1 POM only requires scala-library and com.typesafe:config transitively, so local Gradle/Native Image verification should remain the authority for any later build-argument needs.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is required for meaningful org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1 coverage; the current failure is due to tests using TypedActor APIs that are no longer present in the 2.0.0-M1 actor artifact.
